findings.location: s3 — List型/配列の要素のプロパティを受け渡す場合
findings.description: The Action class code that sends List/array data to JSP is omitted. The source includes a full implementation showing how to create a `UserEmailAddressEntity[]` array from a `SqlResultSet`, set `userEmailAddressArraySize` and `userEmailAddressArray` on a `W11AC03Form`, and call `ctx.setRequestScopedVar`. This code illustrates the required data structure and the mandatory pairing of the array property with its size property — context useful for AI to answer implementation questions.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `UserEmailAddressEntity[] emailAddressArray = new UserEmailAddressEntity[emailAddressList.size()]; ... form.setUserEmailAddressArraySize(emailAddressArray.length); form.setUserEmailAddressArray(emailAddressArray); ctx.setRequestScopedVar("W11AC03", form);` — absent from knowledge s3
